transcript.text: In the last 90 days, I made $122,000 from YouTube without ever being on camera. You see, I run Art of War, a faceless YouTube channel posting 3D animated documentaries on YouTube shorts. And for every 1 million views I get, YouTube pays me about $200. And some months we do 500 to 700 million views. So, this [music] one ends up being very good. And what's interesting is that these faceless YouTube channels can easily be automated with the [music] help of AI and a small team. Like for example, this channel that does $10,000 a month with AI scripts and then a single 2D animator making those videos or Fasted Fred who does $8,000 a month with [music] videos completely made with AI. All of them work by following the same principles. You find a niche where there's no competition. You create content using AI tools to or outsourced teams [music] and you package it in a way that your audience likes and then YouTube pushes it to millions of views. Faces YouTube has to be the most enjoyable business model of 2026. So, if you want to learn how it works, check out this free master class in my bio.
